chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 914 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.5141/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For hearing of main case 12.08.2026 Mr. Shabbir Ali Malik, Advocate for the petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Per office note the instant matter is already fixed on 04.12.2025; however Counsel pleads urgency on the ground that the date already given by the office is longer one, besides the petitioner intends to with the same. He further submits that by granting urgency, the petitioner may be allowed to withdraw the instant petition. Record supports his contention. The application for urgent hearing is allowed and matter is taken up today. 2&3. Counsel under instructions does not wish to press instant Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
